'''New Kisge''' was the eighth [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Chaasch]] in [[Suolriep sector/Legends|Suolriep sector]], with dense underbrush-covered wilderness. It was the [[Samuac]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Vanden Willard/Legends|Vanden Willard]] established [[Delta Base]] on the moon prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Being remote, the moon escaped the attention of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]].

==Behind the scenes==
It has been noted that instances of "Sulorine" as included in ''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]'' were misspellings of Suolriep.
